title: Nursing Aide
description:
Pfizer is one of the world's largest biopharmaceutical companies, developing medicines that save and improve lives across therapeutic areas.

We're seeking a Nursing Aide to join our Pharmaceuticals team in Philadelphia. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Provide direct patient care including hygiene, toileting, and mobility assistance
Monitor and report patient condition changes to nursing staff
Maintain clean, safe patient environments and equipment
Take vital signs and document findings in electronic health records
Support nursing staff with clinical procedures and patient comfort measures
Communicate compassionately with patients and families

requirements.education: High school diploma; Nursing Aide certification (CNA) required
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of patient care or healthcare support experience
